summary: GitHub Actions could not resolve v7 action tags
root_cause: Action versions were asserted without independent verification

summary: Schema tests failed in clean GitHub checkout
root_cause: Tests read generated outputs excluded by .gitignore
fix: Generate EvidencePack from the scenario inside the test
regression_control: test_schema.py self-contained fixture and CLI integration test
paper_impact: None; local test environment had masked missing tracked files

summary: Sequential observations were initially detected as simultaneous conflicts
root_cause: Conflict detection treated earlier telemetry and mitigation values as concurrently active
fix: Added same-class temporal supersession before cross-class conflict evaluation
regression_control: test_real_format_pipeline.py full trajectory and CD=1 integration assertions
paper_impact: Prevented persistent false escalation and inflated conflict-detection result

summary: Historical conflict remained labelled active after final C_t became false
root_cause: The replay stored first detection but did not model lifecycle closure when an adjudication artefact superseded a conflicting source
fix: Added lifecycle-aware conflict history and explicit resolution audit event
regression_control: test_real_format_pipeline.py and test_cli_integration.py lifecycle consistency invariants
paper_impact: State trajectory and scores were unaffected; conflict-report semantics and provisional PC-004 evidence required regeneration

summary: Rapid Pivot pilot SVG contained an unresolved y-coordinate template placeholder
root_cause: A split SVG string used a plain string for y2 instead of an f-string
fix: Interpolated the track y-coordinate and regenerated the SVG and provenance hashes
regression_control: test_paper_assets.py rejects unresolved {y} tokens and parses the SVG as XML
paper_impact: None; detected before Stage 5 packaging, GitHub upload, Colab checkpoint, or manuscript eligibility
